description: 每日 6 条精选英文素材：权威资讯（IEEE Spectrum / MIT Tech Review / Nature 等）+ arXiv 论文摘要 + 行业博客 + 写作 tip。每条标注 CEFR 等级（A2/B1/B2/C1）和文体（学术/资讯/技术博客）。

items.title: OneWM-VLA: One Token Per Frame — Reconsidering Visual Bandwidth in World Models for VLA Policy
items.en: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on auxiliary world modules to plan over long horizons, yet how such modules should be parameterized on top of a pretrained VLA remains an open design question. We introduce OneWM-VLA, which compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame through an Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces the resulting latent stream and the action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective rather than connecting them through a separate decoder. Trained with 14.71M LoRA parameters on a π₀ (2B) backbone, OneWM-VLA improves the average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long, and reaches 60.0% on the long-horizon deformable task Fold Cloth on a real Piper arm.

vocab.cn: 辅助的
参数化的
语义 token
流匹配（VLA 训练范式）
主干模型
低秩适配
可形变的（如衣物）
长程任务
潜在流
轨迹

items.cn: OneWM-VLA 把 VLA 世界模型每帧视觉压成 1 个语义 token，仅训 14.71M LoRA 参数（π₀ 2B 主干冻结），LIBERO-Long 95.6% / Fold Cloth 真机 60%（vs π₀ 20%，+200%）——颠覆「视觉带宽决定 VLA 长程能力上限」的设计直觉。

items.title: LaST-R1: Reinforcing Robotic Manipulation via Adaptive Physical Latent Reasoning
items.en: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly incorporate reasoning to handle complex robotic manipulation. However, existing methods are mostly confined to static imitation learning, which limits adaptivity and generalization. We introduce LaST-R1, a unified VLA framework that uses physically-grounded latent goals from a vision foundation model to guide latent chain-of-thought reasoning for action generation. We propose Latent-to-Action Policy Optimization (LAPO) that jointly optimizes latent reasoning and action generation through reinforcement learning, and an adaptive latent CoT mechanism that learns to emit a special latent_end token to dynamically adjust reasoning length. With only one-trajectory warm-up plus RL post-training, LaST-R1 achieves 99.9% on LIBERO and lifts real-robot success from 52.5% to 93.75%, outperforming GR00T N1, pi-0 and OpenVLA across all six tasks.

vocab.cn: 视觉-语言-动作（n），把视觉 + 自然语言映射到机器人动作的统一模型范式
模仿学习（n），从人类演示数据学习策略，不依赖环境反馈
物理接地的（adj），把潜在表征锚定到真实物体的物理空间属性上
潜在思维链（n），把『思考』放在视觉特征空间里走多步迭代
策略优化（n），用 reward 信号调整动作策略的学习目标
强化学习（n），通过环境反馈学习决策
预热（n），RL 训练前先用少量数据做初始化
后训练（n），SFT 之后用 RL / DPO 等进一步优化模型
超越（v），在性能指标上优于
轨迹（n），机器人执行任务的连续状态-动作序列

items.cn: **机器人模型的「R1 时刻」** —— 把 DeepSeek R1 的「RL 后训练 + 长链思考」第一次完整搬到 VLA。两大创新：① **LAPO** 端到端 RL 联合优化潜在 CoT 推理 + 动作；② 自适应 `<latent_end>` token 学发何时停止推理。仅 1 条轨迹预热 + RL 后训练 → LIBERO 99.9% SOTA / 真机 52.5% → 93.75% (+41pp)，全面超越 GR00T N1 / π₀ / OpenVLA。**Takeaway**：VLA 后训练范式正从「SFT only」走向「SFT + RL with latent CoT」，纯模仿学习时代正在收尾。

items.title: Adaptive Action Chunking at Inference-time for Vision-Language-Action Models
items.en: Action chunking, executing a sequence of actions without intermediate replanning, is a key technique to improve robotic manipulation in vision-language-action (VLA) models. Yet, prevailing approaches use empirically fixed chunk sizes—too large undermines responsiveness to new observations, too small leads to mode-jumping and jerky motion across chunks. We introduce Adaptive Action Chunking (AAC), an inference-time procedure that uses model-predicted action entropy as an uncertainty signal to dynamically determine each chunk size. Operating purely at inference time without any training or architectural changes, AAC delivers consistent improvements: +2.3pp on RoboCasa Kitchen, +0.9pp on LIBERO, and a striking +15pp on real-world manipulation tasks across GR00T N1.5, pi-0 and SmolVLA backbones.

vocab.cn: 动作分块（n），一次预测多步动作再执行，减少 VLM 调用频率
中间重规划（n），执行过程中重新调用模型预测下一步
响应性（n），对环境变化的反应敏捷度
模式跳跃（n），跨 chunk 边界出现的动作不连续抖动
抖动运动（adj+n），不平滑的机械运动
推理时（adj），仅在模型部署执行阶段生效，不影响训练
熵（n），分布的不确定度量化指标
不确定性信号（n），用来触发自适应行为的指标
一致性提升（n），在多种条件下都能稳定带来性能增益
主干（n），底层基座模型，如 GR00T、π₀

items.cn: **推理时即插即用的自适应动作分块** —— 用动作熵动态决定每步执行 chunk 大小：熵高小 chunk 多次重规划，熵低大 chunk 高效执行。**0 训练成本、0 架构改动**就能套在任意 VLA。仿真 RoboCasa +2.3pp / LIBERO +0.9pp，**真机 +15pp**（GR00T N1.5 / π₀ / SmolVLA 都受益）。**Takeaway**：真实世界比仿真复杂得多，AAC 的 +15pp 真机收益就来自「环境扰动越大，自适应分块越值钱」——是 VLA 量产部署时代的「Adam 优化器」级基础工程优化。

items.title: StarVLA: A Lego-like Codebase for Vision-Language-Action Model Developing
items.en: Vision-language-action (VLA) research is fragmented across incompatible action-decoding paradigms, training pipelines, and benchmarks. We introduce StarVLA, a modular open-source codebase that unifies VLM-based and world-model-based VLAs under a single policy-centric formulation L_total = L_action + lambda * L_aux. The framework supports independent backbone-action-head swapping across QwenVL, LLaVA, Cosmos and Gemma backbones with FAST, OFT, Flow-Matching pi, and GR00T dual-system action heads. A unified evaluation interface integrates LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin 2.0, RoboCasa-GR1, and BEHAVIOR-1K benchmarks. Reproducible training recipes match or surpass prior methods on both VLM and world-model backbones with minimal data engineering, marking what we call the PyTorch moment of VLA.

vocab.cn: 碎片化的（adj），分散且彼此不兼容
不兼容的（adj），无法协同工作
动作解码范式（n），把模型输出变成机器人动作的方式
策略中心公式（n），把所有变体抽象成同一策略形式
主干-动作头互换（n），独立替换组件能力
流匹配（n），扩散模型的连续-时间变体
双系统（adj），快慢两层级联架构
统一评估（n），所有方法在同一接口下对比
可复现的（adj），别人能复跑出同样结果
PyTorch 时刻（n），借喻 PyTorch 让 DL 走向工程化的转折点

items.cn: VLA 研究因动作解码范式 / 训练管线 / 评估基准的不兼容而严重碎片化。StarVLA 用一个统一的「策略中心公式」L_total = L_action + λ·L_aux 把 VLM-based 与 World-Model-based 两大范式纳入同一框架。模块化的 backbone-action-head 互换支持 QwenVL/LLaVA/Cosmos/Gemma 主干 + FAST/OFT/π Flow-Matching/GR00T 双系统动作头。LIBERO/SimplerEnv/RoboTwin 2.0/RoboCasa-GR1/BEHAVIOR-1K 五大基准统一评估接口。可复现训练 recipe 在 VLM 与 world-model 主干下均匹配或超越原方法——这是 VLA 的 PyTorch 时刻。

items.title: Hyundai-owned Boston Dynamics Atlas performs handstand and L-sit, signaling production-ready maturity
items.en: Hyundai Motors' robotics unit released a video showing its production-ready Atlas humanoid robot performing complex gymnastics, marking a first-of-its-kind live demonstration that could signal the machine is nearing commercialisation. The robot performed a full handstand, then transitioned into an L-sit position while supporting its entire body weight on its hands. Atlas features human-scale hands with tactile sensing and fully rotational joints. It can lift up to 50kg, operates between minus 20 deg C and 40 deg C, and Hyundai plans to deploy it commercially across its plants from 2028.

vocab.cn: 可量产的（adj），已具备规模化生产水平
人形机器人（n），与人体形态相似的机器人
首创（adj），同类首次
商业化（n），从研发走向市场量产
倒立（n），手撑地面、身体倒立的动作
L 形支撑（n），手撑地、身体呈 L 形的体操动作
触觉感知（n），通过传感器感知力 / 接触
全旋关节（n），可 360° 转动的关节
部署（v），把机器人放到生产场景使用
工厂（n），制造产线所在地

items.cn: 现代汽车旗下波士顿动力公开「量产版 Atlas」执行复杂体操动作的视频——机器人完成完整倒立后转入 L-sit（双手撑地、L 形坐姿），同类首演。Atlas 配备人体尺度灵巧手 + 触觉感知 + 全旋关节，最大单臂负载 50 kg，工作温度 -20°C 至 40°C，现代计划 2028 年起在自家工厂大规模商用。

items.title: Learning while Deploying: Fleet-Scale RL for Generalist Robot Policies
items.en: Although generalist robot policies benefit from large-scale pretraining, offline data alone is insufficient for robust real-world deployment. Deployed robots encounter distribution shift, long-tail failures, and human correction opportunities that fixed demonstration datasets cannot fully capture. We present Learning While Deploying (LWD), a fleet-scale offline-to-online reinforcement learning framework. Combining DIVL for robust value estimation and QAM for policy extraction in flow-based VLA generators, a single policy attains 95% average success across 8 tasks on a fleet of 16 dual-arm robots, with the largest gains on 3-5 minute long-horizon tasks.

vocab.cn: 舰队规模（adj），覆盖多台机器人协同的部署体量
预训练（n），在大规模数据上先训出通用模型
离线数据（n），从预先收集好的 demonstration 中学习
部署（n），把模型放进真实世界落地运行
分布偏移（n），训练分布与部署分布不一致
长尾失败（n），罕见但累计起来重要的失败案例
示教（n），人工演示给机器人学习的数据
离线到在线（adj），先用离线数据预训再用在线数据微调的范式
长程（adj），需要执行多步、跨较长时间的任务
鲁棒的（adj），在扰动和不确定下仍稳健

items.cn: 通用机器人策略受益于大规模预训练，但仅靠离线数据不够鲁棒。已部署机器人会遇到分布偏移、长尾故障与人工纠正机会，固定 demonstration 数据集捕捉不到。LWD 提出舰队级 offline-to-online RL 框架，DIVL 做稳健价值估计 + QAM 在 flow-based VLA 中做策略提取，16 台双臂机器人 8 任务下平均成功率 95%，长程任务（3-5 分钟）收益最大。

archive.title: Rhythm: Learning Interactive Whole-Body Control for Dual Humanoids (arXiv 2603.02856 v2)
archive.en: Realizing interactive whole-body control for multi-humanoid systems is critical for unlocking complex collaborative capabilities in shared environments. Although recent advancements have significantly enhanced the agility of individual robots, bridging the gap to physically coupled multi-humanoid interaction remains challenging, primarily due to severe kinematic mismatches and complex contact dynamics. To address this, we introduce Rhythm, the first unified framework enabling real-world deployment of dual-humanoid systems for complex, physically plausible interactions. The framework integrates three core components: an Interaction-Aware Motion Retargeting (IAMR) module that generates feasible humanoid interaction references from human data, an Interaction-Guided Reinforcement Learning (IGRL) policy that masters coupled dynamics via graph-based rewards, and a real-world deployment system. Extensive experiments on physical Unitree G1 robots demonstrate successful transfer of diverse behaviors such as hugging and dancing from simulation to reality.

vocab.cn: 全身控制（不只是末端执行器）
物理耦合（两机器人有接触）
运动学不匹配（人和机器人关节差异）
接触动力学
统一框架
动作重定向（人类→机器人映射）
基于图的奖励（节点是关节/接触）
仿真到真机的迁移

archive.cn: 继 Figure Helix-02 5/8 演示双人形铺床（无显式通信）后，Rhythm 给出第二条多人形协作技术路线：显式建模物理接触 + 用图奖励学习耦合动力学。三大组件分别解决「人类双人数据→机器人双人参考」「双策略协调学习」「真机 sim-to-real」。在两台 Unitree G1 上完成拥抱、跳舞、推/拉手等 8 类高接触式协作。读这篇能理解 2026 年「分布式协作（Helix-02）vs 接触式协作（Rhythm）」的两套路线分野。

archive.title: Hedging Words: Reading Between the Lines
archive.source: Academic English · 模块第 02 节
archive.en: ML papers are full of hedging — soft phrases that avoid strong commitment. "We hypothesize that X enables Y" really means "we guessed and tried". "Empirically, X seems to work" means "the experiments worked but we don't fully understand why". When you read, recognize hedging so you don't overestimate claims. When you write, hedge appropriately to avoid being attacked by reviewers — but don't hedge so much that your contribution sounds unimpressive.

vocab.cn: 弱断言、不下死结论的措辞
承诺、确定性
假设；动词，名词 hypothesis
经验性地、实验上
高估
恰当地
（论文）贡献
不出彩的、平庸的

archive.cn: 读 paper：识别 hedging 词（we hypothesize / empirically / it seems）能避免被作者忽悠。写 paper：自己也要适度 hedge — 完全不 hedge 会被 reviewer 抓硬伤；hedge 太多 contribution 听起来又虚。

archive.title: Genesis AI unveils GENE-26.5, the first robotic brain to enable human-level physical manipulation (TechCrunch)
archive.en: Genesis AI, the Khosla-backed startup that raised a record $105 million seed round, has gone full stack with GENE-26.5 — its first robotic foundation model — paired with a self-developed 20-DoF dexterous hand built in partnership with Wuji Tech. In demo footage, the system autonomously cracks eggs, slices tomatoes, makes smoothies, threads pipettes, untangles wire harnesses, plays piano, and solves a Rubik's cube — all at 1× real time using a single model, hardware platform, data strategy, and control stack. Co-founder Xian Zhou, the original creator of the open-source Genesis physics engine, told TechCrunch that the team "realized doing the model alone wouldn't cut it — we had to own the hardware. So we went full stack." The proprietary control middleware reportedly slashes 15-cm circular trajectory tracking error from ~20mm to ~2mm and end-to-end latency from ~80ms to as low as 3ms.

vocab.cn: 基础模型 / 通用底座大模型
全栈（自研所有层级）
灵巧的（手部精细操作能力）
自主地（无人为干预）
跟踪误差（控制系统精度指标）
端到端延迟
中间件（连接模型和硬件的软件层）
不够 / 行不通（口语表达）

archive.cn: Genesis AI 在 2025 年 7 月以 1.05 亿美元种子轮（硅谷具身智能赛道纪录）亮相，5 月 6 日发布首个全栈机器人基础模型 GENE-26.5。关键看点：①一个模型 + 一套硬件 + 一套数据策略，1× 真实速度完成「打蛋、切番茄、做奶昔、移液、整理线束、弹钢琴、解魔方」7 类家务级灵巧操作；②自研 20 自由度灵巧手 Genesis Hand 1.0；③控制中间件把端到端延迟从 80ms 砍到 3ms。创始人周衔（原 Genesis 物理引擎作者）原话「只做模型不行，必须掌握硬件，所以我们走全栈路线」是 2026 年具身智能赛道一句标志性宣言。

archive.title: MIT Tech Review: Hidden Human Labor Behind Humanoid Robot Demos
archive.en: The emerging humanoid robot industry is far more dependent on hidden human labor than glossy demos suggest, according to a new MIT Technology Review investigation. The report describes how robots that appear autonomous onstage or in marketing videos are frequently steered in real time by remote human operators, while others depend on large, low-wage workforces to collect the training data they need. This scrutiny comes just as firms such as 1X Technologies and Tesla race to commercialize humanoids for homes and factories, buoyed by billions of dollars in investment and claims that the machines can perform everyday tasks with little human help.

vocab.cn: 新兴的（领域 / 行业）
精美包装过的演示视频
自主的（不需人工干预）
（远程）操控；动词 steer
远程人工操作员
低薪劳动力大军
审视、监督关注
商业化；推向市场
受...支撑、推动；动词 buoy

archive.cn: MIT Technology Review 调查揭示：很多看起来「自主」的人形机器人 demo 实际上由远程操作员实时控制，训练数据也由大量低薪数据工人采集。本文是英文行业新闻的标准范文——句式 emerging X is more dependent on Y than Z suggests / according to a new investigation / This scrutiny comes just as ... 都值得反复读。

archive.title: NVIDIA on Generalist-Specialist Robots
archive.en: The next generation of robots will be generalist-specialists — capable of understanding instructions, learning general skills, and being trained for specific tasks. Building such robots requires an integrated workflow from cloud to robot, ensuring that data collection and generation, training and evaluation of control policies, and safe deployment to physical devices all flow seamlessly. These generalist-specialist systems rely on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for intelligent perception, understanding, and execution of diverse tasks. To accelerate this transformation, the NVIDIA Isaac open platform provides robot developers with a complete toolchain — including models, data pipelines, simulation frameworks, and runtime libraries — built around NVIDIA's three-computer solution.

vocab.cn: 通才-专才（既能广博又能专精）
一体化工作流
数据管线
部署
无缝地
感知
执行
转型、变革
工具链

archive.cn: NVIDIA 官方博客的写法是 "产品 marketing + 工程语言" 的标准范本——长句但结构清晰，每句都有具体名词支撑。学这种英文你能学会怎么写自己 GitHub README 的 "motivation" 段。重点：generalist-specialist 是 NVIDIA 推动的术语，2026 年开始进入主流。

archive.title: Who Owns the Humanoid Stack? (IEEE Spectrum)
archive.en: The humanoid-robot market in 2025-26 is being shaped less by a single technical breakthrough than by strategic choices: who owns the stack, which hardware tradeoffs are prioritized, and how open the software and developer ecosystems will be. Companies taking divergent paths — Tesla's end-to-end silicon and vision-AI play, Figure AI's data-centric enterprise fleet approach, Apptronik's compliant-actuator and certification focus, and Unitree/1X's cost-led hardware strategies — are crystallizing distinct value propositions for customers in logistics, manufacturing, retail and field inspection.

vocab.cn: 与其说是 X 决定的不如说是 Y（高级对比句式）
技术栈
权衡、取舍
（被）优先；动词 prioritize
分化的路径
端到端的
以数据为中心的
（企业级）机队部署模式
正在结晶（这里指逐渐成形）
价值主张（商业术语）

archive.cn: IEEE Spectrum 是机器人 / 电子工程领域最权威的英文行业刊物，行文风格偏 C1（高级英语）。这段把 2025-26 人形机器人市场拆成 4 大流派（Tesla / Figure / Apptronik / Unitree+1X），用 "shaped less by A than by B" 这种典型对比句式。读熟这段，你的英文 industry analysis 写作直接上一个台阶。

archive.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model
archive.en: World Action Models (WAMs) enhance VLA policies by jointly predicting scene evolution and robot actions, but most existing methods represent the predicted world as holistic images or global latents — making it hard for the action decoder to address a specific target object. We propose OA-WAM, which decomposes each frame into N+1 slot states. Each slot maintains a persistent address vector and a time-varying content vector, separating object identity from appearance.

vocab.cn: World Action Model 世界动作模型
整体的；这里指未分解的、混合表示
分解；动词原形 decompose
槽（位）；这里指 object-centric 表示中的一个物体单元
持久的、不变的
（这里）寻址向量，identity 标识
外观；与 identity 对立的概念

archive.cn: arXiv abstract 的标准结构：[Context: WAMs 已有的但...] + [Gap: holistic 表示有问题] + [Method: We propose X, which Y] + [Insight: 把 identity 和 appearance 解耦]。读 1000 篇 abstract 你就能写 abstract 了。

archive.title: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta for Dual-System VLA
archive.en: Dual-system VLAs such as GR00T-N1.6 and π0.5 invoke a heavy VLM backbone at every control step, creating a serious latency bottleneck. We observe that VLM features at adjacent steps are highly redundant. Latent Bridge introduces a lightweight delta predictor that estimates the feature change between consecutive steps, allowing the VLM to be invoked only periodically. Across LIBERO, RoboCasa and ALOHA, we cut VLM calls by 50–75% while preserving 95–100% of task success.

vocab.cn: 双系统（VLM 大脑 + 动作头）
主干网络
（推理）延迟
瓶颈
冗余的
增量、差分；希腊字母 Δ
相邻的、连续的
保留；动词原形 preserve

archive.cn: VLA 推理瓶颈不是「算得慢」，而是「每步都重复算」。Latent Bridge 用轻量 delta predictor 减少 VLM 调用 50-75%，性能几乎不掉。学习重点：cut X by Y% while preserving Z% 这种主张句式是写 paper 必备。

archive.title: Keyframe Chaining VLA solves non-Markovian long-horizon tasks (arXiv 2603.01465)
archive.en: Existing vision-language-action (VLA) models often struggle to generalize to long-horizon tasks due to their heavy reliance on immediate observations. KC-VLA introduces a Task-modulated Keyframe Sampler that extracts event-driven keyframes to efficiently ground long-horizon dependencies, achieving a 92.0% success rate on a non-Markovian ManiSkill benchmark and robust real-world performance.

vocab.cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型
长时程任务
非马尔可夫依赖（动作依赖远距离历史而非当前观测）
关键帧采样器
任务调制的
（动词）锚定 / 落实到
基准测试
鲁棒的

archive.cn: KC-VLA 用「任务调制关键帧采样器」把 VLA 长时程任务从「依赖当前观测」升级到「依赖语义关键帧链」，把非马尔可夫依赖问题转化为稀疏历史 prompt 问题。在自建 4 任务非马尔可夫基准上从 57% 跃升至 92%。这条路与「暴力扩展 context window」相比更 token-efficient，是 VLA 走向真实生活长流程任务（铺床、烹饪）的关键一步。

archive.title: TriRelVLA: Triadic Relational Structure for Generalizable Embodied Manipulation
archive.en: Vision-language-action (VLA) models perform well on training-seen robotic tasks but struggle to generalize to unseen scenes and objects. A key limitation lies in their implicit visual representations, which entangle object appearance, background, and scene layout. We propose TriRelVLA, which constructs an explicit object-arm-task triadic relational structure as the first-class reasoning primitive. A relation-aware graph transformer models inter-node interactions and a bottleneck projects the relation graph into the LLM action head, substantially improving generalization across novel scenes, objects, and task compositions.

vocab.cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型，把感知/语言/动作端到端学到一个网络的范式
泛化（v），从训练分布迁移到未见过的新数据/任务
隐式的（adj），不显式标注/分离的
纠缠（v），多个语义信息混杂在一个表示里
三元的（adj），由三个元素组成的
关系结构（n），用图/三元组等显式建模实体之间关系
原语（n），系统的最小基本单元
图变换器，把图结构与 attention 结合的网络
瓶颈（n），刻意压缩信息维度强制模型抓取核心特征
组合（n），多个元素结合形成新的整体

archive.cn: VLA 模型在见过的任务上表现好但难以泛化。核心瓶颈是隐式视觉表示把物体外观、背景、场景布局纠缠在一起。TriRelVLA 显式构建「物体-手臂-任务」三元关系结构作为推理原语，用 relation-aware Graph Transformer 建模节点交互，再 bottleneck 投影到 LLM action head，跨新场景 / 新物体 / 新任务组合的泛化都大幅提升。
